title: crepis subscaposa
intro: Crepis subscaposa, also known as smallflower hawksbeard, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its small, yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Crepis subscaposa include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
